name: CEFC Hong Kong Financial Investment Company Limited
summary: CEFC Hong Kong Financial Investment Company Limited, an investment holding company, designs, manufactures, and trades in apparels in the United States, Hong Kong, and internationally. The company provides its products under private labels and own brands. It also provides designing, marketing, and advertising services; and money lending services to individual consumers and small businesses. The company was formerly known as Runway Global Holdings Company Limited and changed its name to CEFC Hong Kong Financial Investment Company Limited in October 2017. CEFC Hong Kong Financial Investment Company Limited was founded in 2001 and is headquartered in Wanchai, Hong Kong.
